answerBox: Wade Park is the area surrounding Cleveland's Wade Park green space near University Circle, home to the Cleveland Museum of Art and bordering the Glenville neighborhood. Rent Finder Cleveland doesn't currently list homes directly in Wade Park, but works with Section 8-friendly homes nearby in Glenville and other East Side neighborhoods — tell us what you're looking for.

sections.h2: The Wade Park area of Cleveland
body: Wade Park refers to the neighborhood surrounding Wade Park itself, a Cleveland Metroparks green space on the city's east side bordering **University Circle** and the **Glenville** neighborhood. The park is home to the **Cleveland Museum of Art** and sits along the Rockefeller Park cultural gardens corridor. Housing in the immediate area includes a mix of older apartment buildings and single- and two-family homes, reflecting its position between the University Circle institutions and residential Glenville.

Because Wade Park itself is largely park land and museum, cultural, and university-adjacent property, most of the actual rental housing stock in this pocket of the East Side sits just outside the park's borders — spilling into Glenville to the north and toward Hough to the west. Renters searching for "Wade Park" listings are often really searching for a home within walking or short-transit distance of the museum and University Circle.

Rent Finder Cleveland doesn't currently have listed inventory directly in Wade Park, but we do work with Section 8-friendly rental homes nearby in [Glenville](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-glenville-cleveland/) and other East Side neighborhoods. [Tell us what you're looking for](/p/book-showing) and our local team can point you to homes that fit.
Wade Park sits at the intersection of Cleveland's institutional and residential East Side.

items: **Location:** East side, bordering University Circle and Glenville
**Landmarks:** The Cleveland Museum of Art, the Wade Park lagoon, and the Rockefeller Park cultural gardens along Doan Brook
**Transit:** The RTA Red Line and the HealthLine bus-rapid-transit both serve nearby University Circle
**Institutions:** Close to Case Western Reserve University and the University Circle medical and cultural campus

sections.h2: Renting near Wade Park: what to expect
body: Because Wade Park itself is more park and institutional space than a large residential rental market, most renters searching this area end up looking at listings in adjoining Glenville or Hough. Rents across Cleveland's East Side commonly range from about $750 to $1,800 a month for 2- to 4-bedroom homes, with 2- and 3-bedroom units the most common, based on Rent Finder Cleveland's current selection.

rows: Common in nearby Glenville and Hough

sections.h2: Section 8 in the Wade Park area
body: Wade Park is close to several East Side neighborhoods where Section 8/Housing Choice Vouchers are common. Every home Rent Finder Cleveland works with — including nearby homes in Glenville and Hough — accepts vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready. CMHA runs the voucher program for Cuyahoga County and accepts [applications year-round](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php). Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept vouchers, so always confirm directly with any specific property.

sections.h2: Looking for a home near Wade Park?
body: If you want to live near University Circle and Wade Park's museums and green space, comparing nearby [Glenville](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-glenville-cleveland/) and [Hough](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-hough-cleveland/) listings can widen your options, since Rent Finder Cleveland works with homes in each. [Reach out and tell us what you need](/p/book-showing), and our team will follow up as matching homes become available.

sections.h2: How the search and application process works
body: Because we don't work with listings directly inside Wade Park, the first step is simply telling our team what you're looking for — budget, bedrooms, and whether a Housing Choice Voucher is involved. From there, we can suggest current or upcoming homes in nearby Glenville, Hough, or elsewhere on the East Side that match. Once you find a home you like, you can book a free showing and, if it's a fit, complete your rental application online through our secure DoorLoop portal.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland have houses for rent in Wade Park?
faq.a: We don't currently have listed inventory directly in Wade Park, which is more park and institutional space than a large rental market. We do work with Section 8-friendly homes nearby in Glenville and other East Side neighborhoods — tell us what you're looking for and we'll follow up.

faq.q: What is Wade Park known for?
faq.a: Wade Park is a Cleveland Metroparks green space on the city's east side, home to the Cleveland Museum of Art and bordering University Circle and the Glenville neighborhood, with the Rockefeller Park cultural gardens nearby along Doan Brook.

faq.q: How do I get to Wade Park without a car?
faq.a: The RTA Red Line and the HealthLine bus-rapid-transit both serve nearby University Circle, making the area accessible from downtown and other East Side neighborhoods without a car.

faq.q: What neighborhoods are closest to Wade Park?
faq.a: Wade Park borders University Circle to the south and the Glenville neighborhood to the north. Renters looking in this area often also consider Hough, a short distance to the west.

faq.q: Are there Section 8 rental homes near Wade Park?
faq.a: Yes. Rent Finder Cleveland works with Section 8-friendly, HUD-inspection-ready homes nearby in Glenville and Hough. Every home we work with accepts Housing Choice Vouchers, though Wade Park itself has limited residential rental inventory.

faq.q: How do I start looking for a rental near Wade Park?
faq.a: Tell our team your budget, bedroom needs, and whether you're using a Housing Choice Voucher, and we'll point you to current or upcoming homes in nearby Glenville, Hough, or elsewhere on Cleveland's East Side. From there you can book a free showing and apply online if you find a match.
